Class ReviewCRUD

java.lang.Object
ReviewCRUD
public class ReviewCRUD extends Object
CRUD operations for the Review table in the theater database. Provides methods to insert, delete, update, and retrieve review records.

  • Constructor Details

    • ReviewCRUD

      public ReviewCRUD()

  • Method Details

    • reviewInsert

      public void reviewInsert(int userID, int movieID, int rating, String comment)
      Inserts a new review into the database.
      Parameters:
      userID - The ID of the user submitting the review
      movieID - The ID of the movie being reviewed
      rating - The rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5)
      comment - The comment provided by the user about the movie

    • reviewDelete

      public void reviewDelete(int reviewID)
      Deletes a review from the database.
      Parameters:
      reviewID - The ID of the review to be deleted

    • reviewUpdateRating

      public void reviewUpdateRating(int reviewID, int rating)
      Updates the rating of a review.
      Parameters:
      reviewID - The ID of the review to be updated
      rating - The new rating to be set for the specified review

    • reviewUpdateComment

      public void reviewUpdateComment(int reviewID, String comment)
      Updates the comment of a review.
      Parameters:
      reviewID - The ID of the review to be updated
      comment - The new comment to be set for the specified review

    • reviewRetrieve

      public String reviewRetrieve(int reviewID)
      Retrieves and displays review details from the database.
      Parameters:
      reviewID - The ID of the review to be retrieved
      Returns:
      Review details as formatted string, or null if not found

    • getReviewsForMovie

      public List<String> getReviewsForMovie(int movieID)
      Retrieves all reviews for a specific movie.
      Parameters:
      movieID - The ID of the movie for which reviews are to be retrieved
      Returns:
      A list of formatted review strings for the specified movie
